metadata.description: Claude Best Practices Hub — workflows, skills, agents, and hooks as installable plugins (Goal 6). NOTE: auto-loaded rules/ are NOT plugin-packageable and stay a copy-in step (see issue #187).

plugins.name: cbp-workflows
plugins.description: PILOT — proves the hub's workflow patterns (skills + agents + hooks) package as a native Claude Code plugin with central updates, instead of being copied into each project.
